item.title: GitHubs actions for my Hugo website
item.description: Why CI/CD for my profile website ? This is a test text.

item.title: Mentoring Program
item.description: I’m very happy to be part of the mentoring program of the University of Chemistry & Technology (UCT)Prague. The program gives me the chance to help my student to find and pursue her next career entails, set long-term goals as well as to solve various study and personal challenges and obstacles. My mentee is Maria, a student at the Bioinformatics department of UCT Prague. Together we have created her mentoring path where I will be helping her with job searching, CV writing and expanding her professional network.
